nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool for content creation
nodes.label_negative: Manual content creation without AI assistance
nodes.grounding_span: use AI often for content creation- to summarize, write content, optimize writing, proof read, and to generate ideas

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI errors in math and forecasting
nodes.grounding_span: there are often errors in the math

nodes.label: AI as collaborator for iterative refinement
nodes.label_negative: AI as fully autonomous task completer
nodes.grounding_span: I am more likely to collaborate with it through a task, I've never been able to completely delegate the full task to AI

nodes.label: Human finalization and personalization of AI outputs
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to finalize wording or the order of completing things myself

nodes.label: AI as productivity enhancer
nodes.grounding_span: It took a task I was avoiding and gave me a full plan to start with

nodes.label: AI for mental load reduction
nodes.grounding_span: I would love AI to help me streamline my life. Making it easier to get away from the mundane tasks

nodes.label: Productivity and efficient task completion
nodes.grounding_span: I was able to spend a few hours, create the content and schedule it all to be posted during the week

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal touch
nodes.grounding_span: changing some of the language or speech patterns to sound more like myself

nodes.label: Personal well-being and reduced cognitive load
Satisfaction with AI for content creation
nodes.grounding_span: It felt satisfying to get it checked off after avoiding the task for months

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: The calculations are sometimes wrong, so having to double check or verify. This ends up taking too much time

nodes.label: Preference for human finalization
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to finalize wording or the order of completing things myself

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future personal assistant
nodes.grounding_span: I would like to ideally have it be more integrated as an assistant

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: start the task with a 'brain dump'... then add in revisions... then maybe revise a bit more

nodes.label: Strategic skill differentiation — focuses on human strengths
nodes.grounding_span: It will force me to really focus on the things that AI may not be able to take over
